summary: Tested all 4 P0 bug fixes for Solomon AI platform. All fixes verified working: FIX 1 (Transactions shows 3M+ records), FIX 2 (Donors shows 41K+ donors), FIX 3 (Attendance loads services with headcounts), FIX 4 (Church drill-through shows detailed view). Fixed one frontend bug: token variable was undefined in PlatformDashboard.jsx when passing to ChurchDetail component.

issues: Donor names showing as 'Anonymous' for many transactions - may need to enrich with person data from people collection

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 P0 bug fixes verified working. Platform Transactions shows 3,040,093 total transactions with donor names, church names, amounts, funds, fees, status columns. Platform Donors shows 41,389 total donors, 3,734 active (90d), 84 recurring, DonorIQ breakdown chart, top donors list. Attendance page loads 20 services with headcounts (no infinite loading). Church Detail drill-through shows 12-month giving chart, top donors, recent transactions, member roster, health score (A+ 100/100 for Abundant Downtown). Fixed token variable bug in PlatformDashboard.jsx line 737.

fix_1_platform_transactions.details: 3,040,093 total transactions displayed with Date, Church, Donor, Amount, Fund, Fee, Method, Status columns. Pagination working.

fix_2_platform_donors.details: 41,389 total donors, 3,734 active (90d), 84 recurring, $38 avg gift, $2.6K avg LTV. DonorIQ breakdown: First-Time 43, Occasional 14,457, Regular 12,392, Recurring 84, At Risk 1,883, Lapsed 1,130. Top donors list with Nathan Edwards $46.5K, Member $44.0K, Tiffany Evans $42.8K.

fix_3_attendance_page.details: Attendance page loads 20 services with headcounts (2.7K, 3.4K, 4.3K, etc.). No infinite loading. Service types visible (Sunday 11:00 AM, Sunday 9:00 AM).

fix_4_church_detail_drillthrough.details: Church Detail page shows Abundant Downtown with 18,500 members, $11.6M total giving, 516,977 transactions, 439 active donors (90d), A+ health score (100/100). 12-month giving trend chart, top donors list (Jennifer Lopez $20.2K, James Hernandez $20.2K), member roster, health score breakdown (Engagement 70%, Giving/Member 10$/mo, Groups 1.2/100 Mbrs, Attendance 24%, Recurring 13%).

bug_fixed.issue: token variable was undefined when passed to ChurchDetail component

mocked_apis.solomon_pay: Solomon Pay processor is MOCKED for demo mode - charges always succeed
